narrative:
Perry Twp. township has 4,298 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.6 percentage points.
